title: Vegan Lemon Olive Oil Cake
image_alt: Vegan lemon olive oil cake with lemon icing and fresh berries
steps: Preheat oven to 355°F (180°C). Line an 8-inch loaf pan with parchment paper.

Whisk together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl until no lumps remain. Add the dairy-free milk, olive oil, lemon juice, lemon zest, and vanilla. Mix until just combined — don't overmix.
Pour the batter into the prepared pan and smooth the top.
Bake for 1 hour until a toothpick inserted in the centre comes out with no wet batter (a few crumbs are fine). If the top is browning too quickly, tent loosely with foil.
Cool in the pan for 10 minutes, then transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.

For the icing: whisk lemon juice into the powdered sugar until smooth, adding juice gradually to reach a pourable consistency. Drizzle over the fully cooled cake and scatter berries on top. Keeps at room temperature for 1 day, refrigerated up to 3 days, or frozen (without icing) for up to 1 month.
